summary: Iteration 46 — Tested Feature A (ZKTeco biometric integration under /api/iclock/* + admin /api/biometric/*) and Feature B (super-admin Company Details, enable/disable, edit admin creds, reset PIN, user enable/disable). All 20 backend pytest cases passed. UI smoke on mobile viewport confirmed the new admin tile 'open-biometric-devices', the /biometric-devices screen (add-device-btn, header, empty state), the /companies edit-company-<id> pencil, and the /company-details screen with btn-disable / btn-edit-creds / btn-reset-pin, the 'At a glance' stats grid, and company profile section all render correctly. No React Native red screen, no deprecated packages detected in the two new screens.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 7703 lines — well over the 700-line target; consider splitting biometric, super-admin, and payroll routers into their own modules for maintainability.
biometric-devices.tsx (1116 lines) and company-details.tsx (1079 lines) are also large screen files — extracting bottom-sheets and sub-components into separate files would help.

In /api/companies/{cid}/details, pin_meta uses `bool(company_admin.get('pin_hash') or company_admin.get('has_pin'))` but pin_hash is excluded by the projection above, so the fallback to has_pin is what actually powers this — works today but is fragile if the projection changes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (smoke: admin tile, /biometric-devices, /companies pencil, /company-details buttons all rendered)

seed_data_creation: Tests create throwaway companies (name prefixed TEST_) with random 6-char company_codes and their company_admin (temp PIN returned in create response). One TEST_Firm_* company + one TEST_ClashFirm_* company remain in the DB after run (used for clash tests). Users seeded via direct Mongo insert have prefix bio_/sim_ and are cleaned up in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend surface for iter46: iClock push endpoints under /api/iclock/{cdata,getrequest,ping,devicecmd} (no auth), admin CRUD under /api/biometric/devices, /api/biometric/unmapped, /api/biometric/devices/simulate-punch; super-admin company mgmt under /api/companies/{id}/details, /api/companies/{id}/enabled, /api/companies/{id}/admin, /api/companies/{id}/admin/reset-pin, /api/users/{id}/enabled. Frontend screens: /biometric-devices (testID biometric-devices-screen), /company-details (company-details-screen). Super admin login: OTP dev flow with identifier sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com — response returns dev_code. Web token key in localStorage is 'llc_session_token'.
